race.comment: OYSTER LANE (4) goes on top. He's run well in some better maidens than this, running a solid race second up at Pakenham in a Future Stars Heat behind Plunger, who came out and won the final well on Thursday night. That looks top form and with any luck from the gate he can break through. WETUMPKA (6) contested a much stronger race last start in the G3 CS Hayes at Flemington behind Sixties. He was okay there, beaten 3.5 lengths off a good fresh run and should take catching here. COSTA PAROS (1) has just found one better in his past couple and maps ideally up on speed here. CRAZY TOWN (2) is a gelding by Super Seth on debut for the Busuttin & Young stable who can run well off solid jumpout form. POMAH (11) resumes having shown ability in two runs last time in. Respecting over what could be a suitable trip.
